# Bryan Chua

## Profile
- **Current Role:** CTO at GoPomelo & Digital China Group
- **Background:** Ex-startup founder and CTO
- **Themes:** Enterprise AI, agentic workflows, engineering leadership, startups.
- **Philosophy:** Pragmatic execution over hype. Focus on real-world implementation and leadership.

## Content Focus
Bryan writes essays covering enterprise AI application, building and scaling startups, and the nuances of engineering leadership from the perspective of an experienced operator.
